creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Cheers to a bright and magical Christmas! 🎄❤️ 

These videos were taken during our early Christmas date at @atlantisthepalm. We celebrated this joyful season ahead as I have to be isolated during the peak of the holidays. But despite of it all, our days are merry, our hearts are full of hope, and we are celebrating God’s blessings through and through. ❤️ 

We’re wishing you all a Christmas filed with love, joy, and laughter. ✨✨✨

Atlantis The Palm • Christmas in Dubai • Dubai • Dubai Attractions • Things to do in Dubai • Lady and her sweet escapes • #DubaiChristmas

transcription.text: Take a trip down candy cane lane with me It's the cutest thing I swear you'll ever see It's the best So get dressed And impress You with a girl like that
